description: Extract structured invoice data from document text. Parses semi-structured OCR text to identify and extract: document_id (often labeled as Appud or Document#), vendor_name and vendor_address, customer_name and customer_address, invoice_id (invoice number), invoice_date, due_date (from payment terms), total_amount, tax_amount, and currency. Returns empty string for fields not found in the document.

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `prompt` (string) - **THE RAW INPUT DATA** that varies per instance. Your activity MUST parse and process this!
- `task_type` (str) - context for task type

**CRITICAL:** Your workflow MUST use `prompt` as the input variable. The prompt contains the raw data to process.
Available variables: prompt, task_type

**OUTPUT FORMAT (STRUCTURE DESCRIPTION - NO HARDCODED VALUES!):**
Your activity must return data matching this structure:
```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "fields": {
    "document_id": "string - extracted field",
    "vendor_name": "string - extracted field",
    "vendor_address": "string - extracted field",
    "customer_name": "string - extracted field",
    "customer_address": "string - extracted field",
    "invoice_id": "string - extracted field",
    "invoice_date": "string - extracted field",
    "due_date": "string - extracted field",
    "total_amount": "string - extracted field",
    "tax_amount": "string - extracted field",
    "currency": "string - extracted field"
  }
}
```

**CRITICAL RULES:**
- The format above describes FIELD NAMES and TYPES only
- Extract ACTUAL values from the `prompt` variable at runtime
- Do NOT hardcode any values from examples
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Match field names EXACTLY as specified

inputs.name: document_text
inputs.description: The raw document text containing invoice information, typically from OCR. May include headers, addresses, line items, and payment terms in semi-structured format

output.description: Returns extracted invoice fields as a dictionary with the following structure: {"document_id": "string - unique document identifier (e.g., Appud number)", "vendor_name": "string - name of the vendor/supplier company", "vendor_address": "string - full address of the vendor", "customer_name": "string - name of the customer/recipient", "customer_address": "string - full address of the customer", "invoice_id": "string - invoice number", "invoice_date": "string - date invoice was issued", "due_date": "string - payment due date or terms", "total_amount": "string - total invoice amount", "tax_amount": "string - tax amount if applicable", "currency": "string - currency code (e.g., USD)"}

workflow_spec.name: KILE Invoice Document Extraction
workflow_spec.description: Extracts structured invoice information from document text including document ID, vendor details, customer details, invoice metadata, and financial amounts. Uses LLM for intelligent extraction from semi-structured OCR text.
